mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.name as material_name, m.material_code, s.quantity, s.location, l.name as location_name, z.name as zone_name FROM wms_io_record r LEFT JOIN wms_stock_item s ON r.rfid_tag = s.rfid_tag LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON s.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_location l ON s.location = l.id LEFT JOIN wms_location z ON l.parent_id = z.id ORDER BY r.time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_io_record (rfid_tag, io_type, order_no, device_id, time) VALUES (#{rfidTag}, #{ioType}, #{orderNo}, #{deviceId}, #{time})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wms_io_record WHERE rfid_tag = #{rfidTag} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM wms_io_record WHERE time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT * FROM wms_io_record WHERE io_type = #{ioType} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM wms_io_record WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT * FROM wms_io_record WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM wms_io_record ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT r.* FROM wms_io_record r JOIN wms_stock_item s ON r.rfid_tag = s.rfid_tag WHERE s.material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY r.time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(r.time, '%Y-%m')
DATE_FORMAT(r.time, '%Y-%m-%d')
AS bucket, r.io_type AS ioType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM wms_io_record r JOIN wms_stock_item s ON r.rfid_tag = s.rfid_tag WHERE s.material_id = #{materialId} AND r.time >= #{startTime} AND r.time < #{endTime} GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(r.time, '%Y-%m')
DATE_FORMAT(r.time, '%Y-%m-%d')
, r.io_type ORDER BY bucket ASC
